smart_query: Countries with moderate hunger issues worldwide

analysis.summary: Изследванията в областта на оценката на храните имат потенциал да подобрят устойчивостта на цивилизацията. Технологиите като Neural Field Thermal Tomography и FruitNeRF могат да бъдат използвани за оценка на качеството на храните. Това може да допринесе за достойнството на хората чрез осигуряване на висококачествена храна.
analysis.open_source_momentum: High, with projects like meyerls/FruitNeRF and px39n/Awesome-Precision-Agriculture having a significant number of stars on GitHub
analysis.scientific_frontier: Cutting-edge research in areas like Surface Light Field Tokenization and Neural Field Thermal Tomography is being published on arXiv
analysis.relevance_to_goal: Medium, as sustainable food production and evaluation can contribute to a sustainable civilization and dignity for all

arxiv_papers.title: LiTo: Surface Light Field Tokenization
arxiv_papers.snippet: We propose a 3D latent representation that jointly models object geometry and view-dependent appearance. Most prior works focus on either reconstructing 3D geometry or predicting view-independent diffuse appearance, and thus struggle to capture realistic view-dependent effects. Our approach leverage

arxiv_papers.title: Neural Field Thermal Tomography: A Differentiable Physics Framework for Non-Destructive Evaluation
arxiv_papers.snippet: We propose Neural Field Thermal Tomography (NeFTY), a differentiable physics framework for the quantitative 3D reconstruction of material properties from transient surface temperature measurements. While traditional thermography relies on pixel-wise 1D approximations that neglect lateral diffusion,
